meta.title: Geometric Invariants of the Autogenic Proto-Geometry
meta.description: Every physical constant as a geometric evaluation on D_IV^5. No series, no perturbation, no fitting.
meta.paper: Paper #83 — Geometric Invariants of the APG
meta.format: Each entry: symbol, name, BST formula, geometric source, value, observed, precision, theorem, toy, status

status_key.finite_sum: Finite sum over Bergman spectrum (<=137 terms)
status_key.series: Currently expressed as series, closed form unknown
status_key.missing: No BST expression yet — open problem
status_key.tension: BST value disagrees with observation beyond expected precision

next_priorities: W-15: Spectral zeta g-2 (full a_e as 137-term sum)
W-18: Individual quark masses (d,s,c,b), Lamb shift, hyperfine splitting
meta.inv4_audit: First pass complete. 4 tension flags resolved. T1437 corrected.
meta.inv4_phase2: W-54 observed values tightened for 7 entries

invariants.name: Cabibbo angle
invariants.geometric_source: Two routes: (1) color²/(spacetime³·fiber) = N_c²/(rank³·n_C), (2) vacuum subtraction: rank/√(rank⁴·n_C - 1). 81×79 = 6400-1 connects both. T1444 corollary.

invariants.name: PMNS solar angle
invariants.geometric_source: Tree-level 2-flavor angle N_c/(N_c+g) = 3/10, corrected to 3-flavor effective by cos²θ₁₃ = 44/45. Standard PMNS parameterization.

invariants.name: PMNS atmospheric
invariants.geometric_source: Tree-level 2-flavor angle 4/g = 4/7, corrected to 3-flavor effective by cos²θ₁₃ = 44/45. Standard PMNS parameterization.

invariants.name: Electron anomalous magnetic moment
invariants.geometric_source: Bergman spectral sum (if closed form exists)

invariants.name: Jarlskog invariant
invariants.geometric_source: Full Jarlskog from vacuum-subtracted Wolfenstein parameters. Six T1444 applications total. Bare→dressed: 80→79 (Cabibbo), 12→11 (A parameter). J: 8.1%→0.3%.

invariants.name: Baryon fraction
invariants.note: W-19 RESOLVED (Toy 1450): 1/29 was wrong entry. 18/361 derived from established Omega_m and DM ratio.

invariants.name: Muon anomalous magnetic moment
invariants.geometric_source: Spectral zeta at muon mass scale (not yet derived)
invariants.note: Fermilab 4.2sigma anomaly. BST prediction would be decisive.

invariants.name: Lamb shift (2S-2P hydrogen)
invariants.note: W-18 target. Should be expressible as spectral invariant.

invariants.name: Hydrogen hyperfine splitting
invariants.geometric_source: Hyperfine ∝ α⁴·(rank³/N_c). The α⁴ = 1/N_max⁴ coupling, rank³/N_c = 8/3 = μ_p (bare). BST structure identified (Toy 1470). Full precision derivation needs W-15.
invariants.note: W-18 target. 21-cm line. Should involve alpha^4.

invariants.name: Down quark mass
invariants.geometric_source: Weinberg denominator / Casimir ratio applied to m_u
invariants.note: W-43 resolved (Toy 1451). 13/6 = isospin flip + color correction.

invariants.name: Strange quark mass
invariants.note: W-43 (Toy 1451). Same 4*n_C as Cabibbo angle and alpha_s denominator.

invariants.name: Charm quark mass
invariants.geometric_source: Non-trivial eigenmodes / real dimension. k=0 constant mode excluded.
invariants.note: W-43 (Toy 1451), corrected W-52. 136 = N_max-1 = m_t/m_c. Using PDG m_s: 0.02%. 136 = rank^N_c * (N_c*C_2-1) = 8*17.

invariants.name: Bottom quark mass
invariants.note: W-43 (Toy 1451). From tau: 0.81%. From chain (10/3)*m_c: 2.64%. Tau route preferred.

invariants.name: CMB temperature
invariants.formula: alpha^2 * m_e / (N_c * n_C * C_2 * g * k_B)
invariants.geometric_source: Thermal equilibrium of D_IV^5 at current epoch

invariants.name: Neutrino nature (Dirac, not Majorana)
invariants.formula: N_c = 3 -> Z_3 center -> Hopf fiber -> nu != nu_bar
invariants.note: Falsifiable: 0nubetabeta forbidden. Next-generation experiments test this.

invariants.name: Heat kernel speaking pair formula
invariants.geometric_source: Polynomial ratio of consecutive Seeley-DeWitt coefficients on D_IV^5
invariants.note: Period = n_C = 5. Speaking pairs read BST integers. k=21 pending (needs n=42).

invariants.name: Genetic code size
invariants.note: Triplet code IS N_c=3. DNA and quarks share the same integer.

invariants.name: Number of amino acids
invariants.geometric_source: Twice the real dimension of the APG
invariants.note: Proton and DNA are siblings — each level expresses five integers.

invariants.name: Nineteenth (sixth BST integer?)
invariants.geometric_source: Multiple: heat kernel levels, discriminants, Goedel denominator, spectral data
invariants.note: W-21: Audit recurrences. Appears in too many places to be coincidence.

invariants.name: State count (The 1920 Cancellation)
invariants.note: The group that shapes the space IS the group that counts the states.

invariants.name: K* meson mass
invariants.geometric_source: Geometric mean of ρ and φ

invariants.name: Wolfenstein A parameter
invariants.geometric_source: Color adjoint / dressed Euler sector. Bare = 2C₂ = 12 (Euler × 2 quark sectors), vacuum-subtracted to 11. T1444 corollary.

invariants.name: PMNS reactor angle
invariants.geometric_source: Inverse antisymmetric tensor dimension: dim(Λ²(R^{2n_C})) = 45 independent plane orientations in D_IV^5

invariants.name: Neutrinoless double-beta decay
invariants.geometric_source: Topological zero from N_c = 3 color protection

invariants.name: Pion charge radius
invariants.geometric_source: Vector meson dominance at BST masses

invariants.name: 3D Ising γ exponent
invariants.geometric_source: Color-dressed ratio: bare g/C₂ corrected by Bergman boundary (-1 in denominator)

invariants.name: Brain energy fraction
invariants.geometric_source: Gödel limit = brain's body energy fraction — INV-4: Cross-domain pattern match (~5%)

invariants.name: Supersingular prime fraction for 49a1
invariants.geometric_source: Chebotarev density for supersingular primes of 49a1. Corrected from N_c/g (wrong: excluded bad reduction prime p=7). 1/rank connects to critical line.

invariants.name: Genus of X₀(137)
invariants.geometric_source: Modular curve genus at BST prime

invariants.name: Lithium-7 abundance
invariants.geometric_source: Genus correction at critical temp — INV-4: Lithium problem shared with ΛCDM (~7%)

invariants.name: Charm/strange ratio
invariants.geometric_source: Spectral cap minus constant mode (N_max-1), divided by compact fiber pair (2·n_C). 17 = N_c·C₂-1 appears in denominator 10·13.6 = 136 = 8×17.

invariants.name: Proton lifetime
invariants.geometric_source: Topological stability from g=7 prime winding

invariants.name: Water bond angle
invariants.geometric_source: Tetrahedral angle (N_c+1 orbitals) minus lone pair correction (n_C degrees = compact fiber dimension)

invariants.name: Dark sector fraction
invariants.geometric_source: What observer can't see of itself — INV-4: Composite (Planck PR4 shifted)

invariants.name: Thyroxine iodine count
invariants.geometric_source: Spacetime dimension = iodine atoms in T4

invariants.name: α⁻¹ continued fraction
invariants.geometric_source: CF coefficients include N_max, N_c³, N_c

invariants.name: Dark energy equation of state w
Silk damping scale
invariants.geometric_source: Photon diffusion at BST parameters — INV-4: Cross-domain estimate (~15%)

invariants.name: Reionization redshift
invariants.formula: BST derived from stellar formation threshold
invariants.geometric_source: First stars at BST density — INV-4: Cross-domain estimate (~10%)

invariants.name: 2-loop zeta argument
invariants.geometric_source: Schwinger C₂ coefficient — color charge indexes 2-loop transcendental

invariants.name: 3-loop zeta argument
invariants.geometric_source: Schwinger C₃ coefficient — complex dim indexes 3-loop transcendental

invariants.name: 4-loop zeta argument
invariants.geometric_source: Schwinger C₄ coefficient — genus indexes 4-loop transcendental

invariants.name: Loop denominator progression
invariants.geometric_source: Every QED denominator at loop L factors into BST products

invariants.name: 5-loop max weight prediction
invariants.geometric_source: No new fundamental ζ beyond ζ(7) at 5 loops

invariants.name: Zeta argument product = c₄
invariants.geometric_source: Product of three zeta-indexing primes equals Weierstrass c₄ of BST curve

invariants.name: Third route to 137 (Frobenius norm)
invariants.geometric_source: CM norm equation from Frobenius at p=N_max on 49a1

invariants.name: Frobenius trace at spectral cap (BST reading)
Spectral cap residue classes
invariants.formula: 137 mod g = rank² (137≡4 mod 7), 137 mod N_c = rank (137≡2 mod 3), 137 mod n_C = rank (137≡2 mod 5)
invariants.geometric_source: Spectral cap reduced mod each structural integer returns rank or rank² = the Cartan flat
invariants.value: rank or rank² under all projections

invariants.name: CM norm at spectral prime
invariants.geometric_source: CM norm at p=N_max: the geometry squares the rank and multiplies by itself. Pure self-reference.

invariants.name: Dressed Casimir (N_c·C₂ - 1)
invariants.geometric_source: Bare Casimir product with boundary subtraction. Appears in: Ising γ denominator (21/17), charm mass (136 = 8×17), top/charm ratio (136). The dressed Casimir IS the boundary correction.

invariants.name: Muon lifetime
invariants.geometric_source: Standard weak decay formula with all BST inputs (G_F from Fermi scale, m_μ from spectral ratio)

invariants.name: W boson total width
invariants.geometric_source: 3 lepton + 2N_c quark decay channels. N_c = 3 gives 9 channels total.

invariants.name: Proton magnetic moment
invariants.geometric_source: T1447 PROVED: bare 8/3 = gluon modes (N_c²-1)/N_c per valence quark. Anomalous 13/274 = Weinberg denominator (2C₂+1) / spectral bandwidth (2N_max). Depth 1.

invariants.name: Neutron/proton moment ratio
invariants.geometric_source: T1447 PROVED: -N_max/(rank³·n_C²) = -137/200. Correction from SU(6): ×(411/400) = ×(1+11/400). 11 = 2C₂-1 = dressed Casimir (4 sectors).

invariants.name: Higgs→bb branching ratio
invariants.geometric_source: Dominant Higgs decay: rank² flavors × N_c colors / genus normalization

invariants.name: Neutron electric dipole moment
invariants.geometric_source: CP symmetry in strong sector from topology: D_IV^5 is contractible → θ=0 → d_n=0. No axion needed.

invariants.name: Fine structure constant at m_Z
invariants.geometric_source: Spectral cap minus spacetime cube: running from 1/137 to 1/129 = vacuum polarization

invariants.name: GUT coupling (unification scale)
invariants.geometric_source: Color charge over total (color + compact fiber). Unification of strong and electroweak at GUT scale.

invariants.name: Number of W decay channels
invariants.geometric_source: 3 lepton families + 2 quark doublets × N_c colors. BST: N_c determines quark channel count.

invariants.name: Spectral index (exact BST form)
invariants.geometric_source: Tilt = compact dimension / spectral cap. The CMB imprint of D_IV^5.

invariants.name: Tropical curve vertices (genus g)
invariants.geometric_source: N_c-valent (trivalent) tropical curve of genus g. Tropical shadow of D_IV^5.

invariants.name: Tropical curve edges (genus g)
invariants.geometric_source: N_c-valent tropical curve: handshaking 3V=2E with genus g=E-V+1

invariants.name: Newton polygon area of 49a1
invariants.geometric_source: Newton polygon of y²=x³+ax+b has vertices (0,0),(3,0),(0,2). Area = N_c. Interior lattice points = rank (Pick's theorem).

invariants.name: Plücker coordinates of Gr(rank,n_C)
invariants.geometric_source: Tropical Grassmannian Gr(2,5). dim = rank(n_C-rank) = C₂ = 6. Maximal cones = Catalan(N_c) = n_C = 5.

invariants.name: Associahedron K₅ vertices
invariants.geometric_source: K_{n_C} associahedron: dim = N_c, vertices = rank·g, edges = N_c·g = 21. BST integers control operad polytope.

invariants.name: Catalan number at n_C
invariants.geometric_source: Catalan(n_C) = total Chern class sum = 42. Binary trees with n_C+1 = 6 leaves. The Answer.

invariants.name: Lie operad dimension at N_c
invariants.geometric_source: dim Lie(N_c) = rank. dim Lie(n_C) = 4! = 24 = rank²·C₂. dim Lie(C₂) = 5! = 120 = n_C!

invariants.name: N_max in base N_c
invariants.geometric_source: The spectral cap has n_C digits in base N_c and N_c digits in base g. p-adic representation.

invariants.name: Unit group cascade at BST primes
invariants.geometric_source: Each BST prime p gives |F_p*| = p-1 = another BST integer. The primes cascade through the integer hierarchy.

invariants.name: Iwasawa λ-invariant prediction
invariants.geometric_source: PREDICTION: Iwasawa λ-invariant of 49a1 at p=N_max equals rank. Connects BSD to Iwasawa theory. SPECULATIVE — needs verification.

invariants.name: Max motivic weight of D_IV^5
invariants.geometric_source: Motivic weight filtration: even weights 0,2,...,2n_C give C₂ = 6 steps. Connects to T1445 spectral peeling: each loop adds weight 2.

invariants.name: Non-zero Betti numbers of Q^5
invariants.geometric_source: Compact dual Q^5: odd Betti numbers vanish. Number of non-zero = C₂.

invariants.name: Rydberg constant (BST structure)
invariants.geometric_source: Rydberg = α² coupling. 18769 = 137² = N_max². Hydrogen spectrum from spectral cap squared.

invariants.name: Stefan-Boltzmann denominator
invariants.geometric_source: σ_SB ∝ π⁴/15 where 15 = C(C₂,rank) and 60 = n_C!/rank. Thermal radiation from compact fiber factorial.

invariants.name: Thomson cross section coefficient
invariants.geometric_source: σ_T = (8π/3)·(α/m_e)². Coefficient 8/3 = rank³/N_c = bare proton moment. Same BST ratio in scattering and magnetism.

invariants.name: Harmonic number H₅ = N_max / (n_C!/rank)
invariants.geometric_source: H₅ = 1+1/2+1/3+1/4+1/5 = 137/60. Numerator = spectral cap. Denominator = Stefan-Boltzmann denominator. Bridges QED ↔ thermodynamics through one number.

invariants.name: B₂ root count
invariants.geometric_source: B₂ has 4 short roots (multiplicity N_c) + 4 long roots (multiplicity 1). Total = 8 roots, dim so(5) = 10.

invariants.name: Dimension of so(5)
invariants.geometric_source: Lie algebra of compact factor SO(5). dim = C(n_C,2) = 10.

invariants.name: Dimension of so(2)
invariants.geometric_source: Lie algebra of SO(2) factor in isotropy. Circle = 1 angular degree of freedom.

invariants.name: Fundamental representation dimension
invariants.geometric_source: dim of fundamental representation of SO(2n_C+rank-1) compact form = g.

invariants.name: BST subobject classifier
invariants.geometric_source: N_c-valued topos logic. proved = depth 0, conditional = depth 1, open = depth >1. Łukasiewicz 3-valued.

invariants.name: Lawvere fixed point = graph self-description
invariants.formula: T1353: graph statistics = BST integers (Lawvere's theorem on self-description endofunctor)
invariants.geometric_source: The theorem graph maps to its own statistics. The fixed point: avg_deg=2n_C+1, mode=N_c, strong=n_C/C₂. Lawvere's theorem instantiated.

invariants.name: Classifying topos has one point
invariants.geometric_source: The classifying topos of BST's geometric theory has exactly one point = the APG. Topos-theoretic uniqueness (T1427).

invariants.name: Z boson total width
invariants.formula: G_F m_Z³ × R_Z/(6π√2) where R_Z = 3·823/338, 823 = C₂·N_max+1 (prime)
invariants.geometric_source: 21 = N_c·g decay channels. R_Z ratio involves 823 = C₂·N_max+1. QCD-corrected.

invariants.name: Higgs→WW* branching ratio
invariants.geometric_source: Color charge over twice the genus. Second-largest Higgs decay.

invariants.name: Higgs→gg branching ratio
invariants.geometric_source: Gluon fusion inverse: one over the Bergman normalization unit.

invariants.name: Higgs→ττ branching ratio
invariants.geometric_source: Tau Yukawa: one over spacetime dimension squared.

invariants.name: Z boson decay channels
invariants.geometric_source: Color × genus = total Z decay channels (3 lepton pairs + 5 quark pairs × color + neutrinos)
